mapper.insert:
select SEQ_GLOBAL.NEXTVAL from dual
insert into question ( id, f_code, q_idx, q_status, q_title, q_content, q_answer, q_answerDate, q_secret, q_createdDate ) values ( #{id}, #{f_code}, #{q_idx}, #{q_status}, #{q_title}, #{q_content}, null, null, #{q_secret}, sysdate )
mapper.select: select q.id, q.f_code, q.q_idx, q.q_status, q.q_title, q.q_content, q.q_answer, q.q_answerDate, q.q_secret, q.q_createdDate, f.c_id, f.c_kind, f.c_name from question q join furniture f on q.f_code = f.f_code where q.f_code = #{f_code} order by q_idx desc
select id, f_code, q_idx, q_status, q_title, q_content, q_answer, q_answerDate, q_secret, q_createdDate from question where id = #{id} order by q_idx desc
mapper.update: update question set q_answer = #{q_answer}, q_answerDate = sysdate, q_status = 'done' where q_idx = #{q_idx}
mapper.select: select q.id, q.f_code, q.q_idx, q.q_status, q.q_title, q.q_content, q.q_answer, q.q_answerDate, q.q_secret, q.q_createdDate, f.c_id, f.c_kind, f.c_name, f.f_name from question q join furniture f on q.f_code = f.f_code where f.c_id = #{c_id} order by q.q_idx desc
